decoded.meaning: FIELD{ NAME "settings", NAME "app", NAME "kp" } — :settings.app.kp (an RFC-0010 owner app field: the reserved `app` subkey inside the settings container, then the owner-declared name)
decoded.note: RFC-0004 §B/§C canonical bytes; structured TLV, opt.PL=1, no trailers (at-rest form). RFC-0010 §A.1: `app` is a reserved NAME inside vertex SETTINGS — the path grammar is unchanged, one more scalar level.
